{"style":"artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep imagery, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, anime-to-CG transformation, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style.","panels":[{"index":0,"current":{"panelIndex":2,"panelNumber":3,"shotType":"Extreme Close-Up","cameraMove":"Static","description":"Extreme close-up: Thẩm Mặc slowly raises his hand, gently lifting Hạ An's chin with his fingers to force her to meet his gaze.","location":"盛世集团总裁办公室_夜晚","srtSegment":"Thẩm Mặc từ từ đưa bàn tay thon dài lên, ngón tay nhẹ nhàng nâng cằm cô lên đối diện với ánh mắt mình.","duration":4.81,"characters":[{"name":"Thẩm Mặc","appearance":"初始形象","screen_position":"left side of frame","posture":"leaning forward, hand lifting chin","acting":"head tilted slightly down, eyes narrowed and sharp, gaze penetrating, lips firm with a subtle curl at corners, breath steady and controlled"},{"name":"Hạ An","appearance":"初始形象","screen_position":"right side of frame","posture":"seated, chin lifted","acting":"head tilted back by the gesture, eyes wide meeting his, lips parted with faint tremor, a quick shallow breath then held, lashes flicker"}],"photographyRules":{"lighting":{"direction":"Key light from top left creating dramatic shadows on hand and faces, rim light from right","quality":"Hard, focused light for tension"},"depth_of_field":"Medium DOF (T5.6), both characters sharp due to intense physical interaction","color_tone":"Warmer key on skin, cooler shadows, intimate tension"},"existingVideoPrompt":"[Scene] A dark, quiet corporate office interior at night. The scene is completely static, no ambient motion, the background remaining a deeply out-of-focus shadowy void.
[Characters] Thẩm Mặc: About thirty years old, Male, sharp jaw, defined face. Sharp eagle-like eyes, slanted brows, high nose, thin lips. Dark hair combed back. Tall athletic build. Deep blue suit, black shirt, silver tie, black trousers, black oxford shoes. Intense and controlled.
Hạ An: About twenty-five years old, Female, oval face, delicate sharp jawline with soft lines. Long finely arched willow-leaf eyebrows, faint at the start and tapered at the end. Large rounded almond-shaped eyes with clear double eyelids, inner corner slightly hooked, outer corner naturally drooping, gaze clear and melancholic. High straight nose, small delicate nose tip. Full lip shape with a slightly thicker lower lip. Black straight hair past the shoulders, neat ends, thin air bangs gently covering the forehead. Slender and tall figure. White stand-collar shirt, black thin ribbon tied at the collar, black high-waisted wide-leg suit trousers, black pointed low-heel shoes. Vulnerable, trembling, breathless.

Shot 1 (Extreme Close-Up, 2.4s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Thẩm Mặc's long fingers curl and tighten their grip beneath her chin with a slow, deliberate pressure. A subtle tremor runs through his hand as he holds her gaze firmly. Slow-motion, smooth and fluid movement.

Shot 2 (Extreme Close-Up, 2.4s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Hạ An's lower lip quivers almost imperceptibly. The single tear clinging to her eye finally breaks free, slowly tracing a glistening path down her pale cheek. She is frozen in a held breath, the rest of the frame completely still."},"previous":null,"characters":[{"name":"Thẩm Mặc","appearance":"Initial appearance","description":"About thirty years old, Male, Male, thirty, sharp jaw, defined face. Sharp eagle-like eyes, slanted brows, high nose, thin lips. Dark hair combed back. Tall athletic build. Deep blue suit, black shirt, silver tie, black trousers, black oxford shoes."},{"name":"Hạ An","appearance":"Initial appearance","description":"About twenty-five years old, Female, 二十五岁女性，鹅蛋脸，下颌尖细线条柔美。柳叶眉细长微弯，眉头淡眉尾聚。杏眼大而圆，双眼皮清晰，眼头略勾，眼尾自然下垂，目光清澈忧郁。鼻梁高挺，鼻头小巧。唇形丰满，下唇微厚。黑色直发过肩，发尾整齐，空气刘海轻薄覆额。身材纤细修长。白色立领衬衫，领口系黑色细带，黑色高腰阔腿西裤，脚穿黑色尖头低跟单鞋。"}],"location":{"name":"盛世集团总裁办公室_夜晚","description":"「盛世集团总裁办公室_夜晚」广角镜头展现办公室全景。正面落地窗完整呈现城市夜景，左侧窗帘收拢。左侧放置黑色办公桌，桌面有文件夹和笔。右侧靠墙摆放灰色沙发组，配玻璃茶几，两者之间留有间距。天花板暗藏灯带和射灯均匀照明。深色木地板延伸至窗边，办公桌前留出大片空旷区域。","availableSlots":["黑色办公桌正前方的中央空地","灰色沙发组和玻璃茶几之间的区域","落地窗左侧的墙边位置","办公室入口处的地面空间"]}}]}

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] A dark, quiet corporate office interior at night. The scene is completely static, no ambient motion, the background remains a deeply out-of-focus shadowy void.
[Characters]
Thẩm Mặc: Man's large, long-fingered hand with dark blue suit sleeve and silver cufflink. Hand is the only visible part of the character. Emotional state: intense, controlled.
Hạ An: Woman's lower face visible: delicate chin, full lips slightly parted. Single tear clinging to lower lashes. Translucent rosy smooth skin texture. Emotional state: vulnerable, trembling, breathless.

Shot 1 (Extreme Close-Up, 2.4s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Thẩm Mặc's long fingers slowly curl and tighten their grip beneath her chin with a deliberate, increasing pressure. A subtle tremor runs through his hand. Slow-motion, smooth and fluid movement.

Shot 2 (Extreme Close-Up, 2.4s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: Hạ An's breath quivers deeply as the single tear clinging to her lower lashes finally breaks free, slowly tracing a glistening path down her pale cheek. Slow-motion, smooth and fluid movement.
